changelog:
What's new in v2.4.7:
- Workspace shows "Active" even without Rootfs (no more "Disabled" label)
- Update card now shows error messages when check fails
- Consistent APK signing key (no more installation conflicts)
- Auto-select "Grex-Spce" workspace for all assistants on first launch
- file read/write/create/delete/search all work without Rootfs
- "hii" text duplication issue fixed (keyboard/ASR input handling improved)
